prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Honda D16A9** (1.6L DOHC 16V, 130 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, custom **Toda Racing** forged internals (8.5:1 compression pistons, billet crank, and H-beam rods), and a **Hondata K-Pro ECU** tuned for 280+ PS on E85 fuel with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller

Full **Tein Flex Z** coilover suspension with **Cusco 22mm front / 18mm rear adjustable sway bars**, **SPL Parts** front lower control arms, and **Hardrace** camber plates for aggressive alignment (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear)
Custom **3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **HKS Hi-Power** with a **Spoon Sports 4-2-1 header**, **Mugen MF-10 cat-back**, and **GReddy EVO-R blow-off valve** for the D16A9 turbo setup
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1** widebody kit (JDM-spec, fiberglass) with **Voltex Type 3** front lip and **Seibon Carbon** hood (vented, 50% weight reduction)
**Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +35** wheels (ET35) with **Yokohama Advan A052** 205/50R15 tires, paired with **Project Kics R40** lug nuts and **NRG Innovations** extended wheel studs
**Mugen GP** front bumper lip, **C-West** rear diffuser, and **J's Racing** side skirts, all painted in **Honda Championship White (NH-574M)** with **3M Matte Black** roof and mirrors
